title: Figure 1 in Evaluation of the Allplex̎ GI-Helminth(I) Assay, the first marketed multiplex PCR for helminth diagnosis
author: Autier, Brice
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Proportion of samples detected with the Allplex™ GIHelminth(I) Assay according to fecal egg count. Comparison of groups by Fischer's exact test, p <0.001.
